mapper.sql: select a.apply_id, a.apply_no, a.matter_id, m.matter_name, a.applicant_id, a.applicant_name, a.id_card, a.phone, a.apply_remark, a.status, a.reject_reason, a.opinion, a.result_file_url, a.handler_id, a.handler_name, a.assign_time, a.handle_time, a.finish_time, a.create_time, a.update_time from comm_apply a left join comm_matter m on a.matter_id = m.matter_id
mapper.select:
AND a.apply_no like concat('%', #{applyNo}, '%')
AND m.matter_name like concat('%', #{matterName}, '%')
AND a.applicant_name like concat('%', #{applicantName}, '%')
AND a.phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND a.status = #{status}
and date_format(a.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(a.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by a.create_time desc
where a.applicant_id = #{applicantId} order by a.create_time desc
select count(1) from comm_apply where apply_no like concat(#{prefix}, '%')
mapper.insert: insert into comm_apply (apply_no, matter_id, applicant_id, applicant_name, id_card, phone, apply_remark, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{applyNo}, #{matterId}, #{applicantId}, #{applicantName}, #{idCard}, #{phone}, #{applyRemark}, #{status}, sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.select: select m.matter_name as label, count(*) as value from comm_apply a join comm_matter m on a.matter_id = m.matter_id group by m.matter_id, m.matter_name order by value desc limit #{limit}
